items.prompt: After a local buffer insert, the STA idea you reach for first is…
choices: Rebuild the entire chip from scratch only
Incremental invalidate / recompute of the affected cone
items.explain: Incremental update recomputes only what the edit touched.

items.prompt: Setup and hold slack use the same formula with the same clock edge pair.
items.explain: Setup and hold use different edge relationships and inequalities.

items.prompt: A natural next course after STA is…
items.explain: SDC teaches clocks and exceptions the timer consumes.
